summary: Fixed main runtime promotion architecture failure by keeping nginx architecture test inputs in the runtime-only allowlist.
rootCause: NginxRuntimeConfigTests checked nginx/default.conf and nginx/local-https.conf, but scripts/main-runtime-allowlist.txt omitted those files from release/main-promote.

validations.name: RED allowlist architecture test
validations.result: failed before implementation because nginx/default.conf was missing from the allowlist

risks: Existing promotion PR #113 needs a refreshed release/main-promote push after this fix lands on dev.
GHCR publish still depends on main merge and Publish GHCR Main success.
Existing GitHub Actions Node.js 20 warnings remain unrelated.
recommendation: Merge to dev, refresh release/main-promote, verify CI Main Runtime, merge to main, and confirm GHCR publish.
